summary: First-finish smoke test of LifeStream Blood Bank app (React + FastAPI + Mongo). Backend endpoints (stats, donors GET/POST with filters, requests POST, contact POST) all return 200 with valid payloads. Frontend E2E covered Home, Register (new donor persisted), Find Blood (filter by city returned the just-registered donor with correct count), Donors directory (table lists new donor), Request Blood (success toast shown), and Contact (submit ok). Persistence verified: donor registered via UI became searchable immediately.
passed: POST /api/donors, /api/requests, /api/contact all return 200 with generated id
Home page loads with hero, stats banner and CTAs
Register form submits and success toast; donor persists
Find Blood filter by city returns 1 donor found (new donor visible)
Donors directory table shows newly registered donor
Request Blood shows success toast 'Request submitted!'
notes: Urgency dropdown options are Normal/Urgent/Critical (not High). Only Normal/Urgent/Critical are valid choices.
